results.title: Cookie Kerfuffle
results.overview: It's Christmas time again at the North Pole, and Mrs. Claus is not having it! The grande dame of the North Pole herself is FORCED to make cookies after being caught “dancing” by one of her elves. That is until she finds the Claus family recipe MISSING! What a catastrophe! Join Mrs. Claus on her valiant attempt to recover the lost recipe and bring justice to this thief!

results.overview: Beyond the flatland's where the Spahn Ranch once stood a gathering of Charles Manson devotees find refuge in the woods. When a member of their group is brutally attacked they are forced to take revenge.
